content: The Home tab shows Yiqiao's personal background, passion project, and deployed apps. Passion Project: W.Y.N. Associates, LLC — a registered legal entity in New York for for-profit personal passion projects. Deployed Apps: HuggingFace Apps at https://huggingface.co/eagle0504. Yiqiao has been building AI/ML apps since 2016 showcasing AI, ML, NLP, and GenAI.
